name: votebroker-modern
description: Modernized VoteBroker workspace with USD-targeted voting and vote-funded billing.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @votebroker/domain && npm run build -w @votebroker/api && npm run build -w @votebroker/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @votebroker/domain && npm run typecheck -w @votebroker/api && npm run typecheck -w @votebroker/web
